<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model; /** * Class Author. * * A test model used for the relationship tests. * * @property int $id * @property string $name */ class Author extends Model { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public $timestamps = false; /** * {@inheritdoc} */ protected $fillable = ['name']; }
